_note: Load-first ground-truth chunk. Reconciles vision / recorded-decisions / actual-code as of 2026-05-29; wins over older chunks on conflict.

items.label: Schema truth (pair: Graph1 + single graph2; operational edges as marker chains, both sides)
Layer model (sideways/upward = same/upper floor; one firing one layer; poisoned-apple; provenance-gap-test)
Engine invariants (input_nodes DO-NOT-CHANGE; VF2; step 4c; node recycling = allocation only)
Encoding invariants (one role per element; encode-at-construction; transition contract; output node >=1 op-edge, multiple = merge)
Confusion tells (finished=stuck; transition input vs output; sideways vs upward)
Rules state (add_init 16 / bit_add 8 / drain 16 / add_finalise NEEDS REDESIGN / tombstone_gc)
Open: reversibility classification (per rule/floor; gate on overlap RATE not can-overlap proof)
Open: hyperedges structural requirement (when, not whether)
Resolved 2026-05-29: GA mutation stability (single pass kept; stability via constrained operators)
Supersedes list (stale points in frameworks / design_rationale / roadmap / open_questions)
